notes: Stage 38F is a focused inline canvas-fit patch on top of Stage 38E.
The patch overrides the canvas-first preview-stage stretch to height:auto so the right-panel dead-space diagnostic measures the actual 16:9 frame instead of the full spare viewport height.
Runtime diagnostics are patched to expose stage38FCanvasFitStatus and to overwrite rightPanelFitStatus.previewDeadSpace after the fit measurement runs.
Stage 38E slide structure controls and Stage 38D gallery diagnostics are preserved.
